nasb.text: Then Jeremiah went to Mizpah to Gedaliah the son of Ahikam and stayed with him among the people who were left in the land.

esv.text: Then Jeremiah went to Gedaliah the son of Ahikam, at Mizpah, and lived with him among the people who were left in the land.

cnv.text: 耶利米就到米斯巴去見亞希甘的兒子基大利，和他一同住在那地剩下的人民中間。

ccb.text: 耶利米就到米斯巴的基大利那里，居住在留下来的人当中。
